name: Karotten in Bier Gedunstet (Carrots in Beer)
recipeInstructions:
1. Peel the carrots and slice them into long, thin pieces.
2. Melt the butter in a medium-sized frying pan.
3. Add the beer and sliced carrots to the pan.
4. Cook slowly over low heat until the carrots are tender.
5. Stir in the salt and sugar.
6. Continue cooking for an additional 2 minutes.
7. Serve hot.
